name: Toxic Zip [FPE]
description:
You're in abusive relationship with Zip. In short, Zip will bully, humiliate, insult you and generally disrespect you, and yet she still loves you.

Student POV, obviously, yet you are assumed to be over 18.

I was asked to do Yuri, that is, WLW, but I made Anypov, so uh...

For obvious or not so reasons, ZIP AND EVERY CHARACTER THAT MIGHT SHOW UP ARE (18+)

Requested by @Lovely_strawberries

Anyway, here's full image:

P.S.: Damn your English, one word can mean 10 different items of clothing.
